name: Counter
description: Event counter block - counts events and outputs the accumulated count
xmlExample:
<BasicBlock id="..." parent="..." interfaceFunctionName="Counter" blockType="c" dependsOnU="0" dependsOnT="0" simulationFunctionName="counter" simulationFunctionType="C_OR_FORTRAN" style="Counter">
  <ScilabString as="exprs" height="3" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
    <data line="1" column="0" value="2"/>
    <data line="2" column="0" value="1"/>
  </ScilabString>
  <ScilabDouble as="realParameters" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabInteger as="integerParameters" height="1" width="3" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="1"/>
    <data line="0" column="1" value="2"/>
    <data line="0" column="2" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <Array as="objectsParameters" scilabClass="ScilabList"/>
  <ScilabInteger as="nbZerosCrossing" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabInteger as="nmode" height="1" width="1" intPrecision="sci_int32">
    <data line="0" column="0" value="0"/>
  </ScilabInteger>
  <ScilabDouble as="state" height="0" width="0"/>
  <ScilabDouble as="dState" height="1" width="1">
    <data line="0" column="0" realPart="0.0"/>
  </ScilabDouble>
  <Array as="oDState" scilabClass="ScilabList"/>
  <Array as="equations" scilabClass="ScilabList"/>
  <mxGeometry as="geometry" x="0.0" y="-10.0" width="60.0" height="40.0"/>
</BasicBlock>
anomalies: dState exists but state is empty - uses discrete state
Control port for event counting (signals incremental)
3-parameter exprs: initial value, max count, increment direction
Multiple integer parameters [1, 2, 0] for internal counter configuration
criticalRules: Control port is input event (not clock)
dState must be kept for counter persistence
